# Prompt Paster LLM Index

Prompt Paster is a native macOS menu-bar utility for selecting reusable coding
agent prompts from an overlay and copying them to the clipboard.

## Core Tree

```text
Package.swift
.github/
  workflows/
    release.yml
Packaging/
  Entitlements.plist
  Info.plist
  PromptPaster.icns
Sources/PromptPaster/
  App/
    AppDelegate.swift
    PromptPasterApp.swift
    StatusItemIcon.swift
  Models/
    Prompt.swift
    PromptLibrary.swift
  Services/
    ClipboardService.swift
    HotkeyController.swift
    PromptLibraryCoding.swift
    PromptSearch.swift
    PromptStore.swift
    SettingsStore.swift
  Overlay/
    OverlayDisplayConfiguration.swift
    PromptOverlayActions.swift
    OverlayKeyCaptureView.swift
    OverlayWindowController.swift
    PromptOverlayState.swift
    PromptOverlayView.swift
  Resources/
    SeedPrompts.json
  Settings/
    SettingsView.swift
    SettingsWindowController.swift
  LibraryManager/
    PromptLibraryManagerState.swift
    PromptLibraryManagerView.swift
    PromptLibraryManagerViewModel.swift
    PromptLibraryManagerWindowController.swift
Tests/PromptPasterTests/
  PromptLibraryManagerStateTests.swift
  PromptLibraryTests.swift
  PromptOverlayStateTests.swift
  PromptSearchTests.swift
  PromptStoreTests.swift
docs/
  .nojekyll
  design-architecture-spec.md
  index.html
  implementation-plan.md
  review-recommendations.md
scripts/
  build-app.sh
  build-dmg.sh
  generate-app-icon.sh
  generate-status-icon-preview.sh
  validate-release-package.sh
```

## Critical Entry Points

- App entrypoint: `Sources/PromptPaster/App/PromptPasterApp.swift`
- App delegate and menu actions: `Sources/PromptPaster/App/AppDelegate.swift`
- Menu-bar template icon drawing: `Sources/PromptPaster/App/StatusItemIcon.swift`
- Overlay window management: `Sources/PromptPaster/Overlay/OverlayWindowController.swift`
- Overlay UI, adaptive prompt-card grid, and keyboard selection state:
  `Sources/PromptPaster/Overlay/PromptOverlayView.swift`
- Pure overlay state and smart card layout helpers:
  `Sources/PromptPaster/Overlay/PromptOverlayState.swift`
- Fallback global hotkey registration: `Sources/PromptPaster/Services/HotkeyController.swift`
- Persisted preferences and launch-at-login state: `Sources/PromptPaster/Services/SettingsStore.swift`
- Prompt library editor window, filtering, editing, validation, and save flow:
  `Sources/PromptPaster/LibraryManager/PromptLibraryManagerWindowController.swift`,
  `Sources/PromptPaster/LibraryManager/PromptLibraryManagerView.swift`,
  `Sources/PromptPaster/LibraryManager/PromptLibraryManagerViewModel.swift`,
  and `Sources/PromptPaster/LibraryManager/PromptLibraryManagerState.swift`

## Data Model and Storage

- Prompt model: `Sources/PromptPaster/Models/Prompt.swift`
- Prompt library schema and validation: `Sources/PromptPaster/Models/PromptLibrary.swift`
- JSON encoder/decoder setup: `Sources/PromptPaster/Services/PromptLibraryCoding.swift`
- Application Support prompt store: `Sources/PromptPaster/Services/PromptStore.swift`
- Prompt editor edits save through `PromptStore.save(_:)`, which validates the
  full `PromptLibrary`, rejects stale saves when `prompts.json` changed outside
  the editor, writes atomically, and updates the published in-memory library so
  the overlay sees saved edits without moving local usage stats into JSON.
- Bundled seed data: `Sources/PromptPaster/Resources/SeedPrompts.json`

Default user library path:

```text
~/Library/Application Support/Prompt Paster/prompts.json
```

## Search, Hotkey, and Overlay Behavior

- Search/category filtering: `Sources/PromptPaster/Services/PromptSearch.swift`
- Fallback global hotkey: `Control + Option + Space` through `HotkeyController`.
- Trigger mode, double-Control timing, launch-at-login state, overlay display
  sizing, prompt preview character limits, and prompt selection shortcut mode
  are managed by `SettingsStore`.
- Prompt ordering mode and per-category ordering overrides are managed by
  `SettingsStore`. Local usage stats are managed by `PromptUsageStore`,
  persisted in user defaults by prompt ID, pruned against the loaded library,
  and kept out of `prompts.json` and bundled seed JSON.
- Keyboard event bridge: `Sources/PromptPaster/Overlay/OverlayKeyCaptureView.swift`
- Current overlay scope: browse prompts as adaptive rectangular cards, search,
  filter, navigate, copy selected prompts, close after successful copy, and keep
  the overlay open on clipboard failure.
- Current library editor scope: open from the status menu or Settings, search
  prompts, filter by category and tag, edit title/body/category/tags, validate
  before saving, protect unsaved drafts during navigation/reload, reject stale
  saves after external file edits, reload while keeping the last valid library
  on invalid JSON, and keep open/reload/reveal file actions available for
  advanced users.
- Prompt cards use width-based column counts plus deterministic span/height
  helpers so dense prompts can take more room without changing result order or
  shortcut assignment.
- Prompt selection shortcuts default to spatial center-keyboard letters assigned
  from the visible card layout. The Settings window can switch badges and key
  handling back to numeric `1`-`9` mode.
- Prompt ordering is configurable globally and per category from Settings:
  library order keeps the loaded prompt sequence, most-used sorts by copy
  count, and recently-used sorts by last successful copy. Search and category
  filters narrow the result set first; non-empty searches keep search relevance
  ahead of usage ranking, and the selected ordering mode then sorts within the
  relevance group with library order as the stable tie-breaker.

## Configuration and Packaging

- SwiftPM configuration: `Package.swift`
- GitHub release workflow: `.github/workflows/release.yml`
- User preferences and login-item integration: `Sources/PromptPaster/Services/SettingsStore.swift`
- App bundle metadata: `Packaging/Info.plist`
- Checked-in app icon: `Packaging/PromptPaster.icns`
- Signing entitlements for release builds: `Packaging/Entitlements.plist`
- Local `.app` builder: `scripts/build-app.sh`
- Local DMG builder: `scripts/build-dmg.sh`
- Icon regeneration helper: `scripts/generate-app-icon.sh`
- Menu-bar icon preview helper: `scripts/generate-status-icon-preview.sh`
- DMG structure, bundle-signature, optional notarization, and optional launch
  validator: `scripts/validate-release-package.sh`
- GitHub release workflow behavior: manual dispatch or `v*` tags build the DMG
  on macOS, optionally import a Developer ID Application certificate from
  secrets, optionally notarize, upload the DMG artifact, and create/update the
  GitHub Release with the DMG attached. The workflow uploads both a versioned
  DMG and stable `PromptPaster.dmg` alias for direct website downloads, then
  downloads and validates the published stable asset.
- GitHub Pages minisite: `docs/index.html`, published from the `docs/` folder
  on `main` at `https://prompt-paster.github.io/prompt-paster/`.
- Build output is ignored under `.build/` and `dist/`.

## Planning and Agent Context

- Static agent rules: `AGENTS.md`
- Dynamic agent state: `.agent-plan.md`
- Product/design spec: `docs/design-architecture-spec.md`
- Implementation roadmap: `docs/implementation-plan.md`
- Prior app-shell review rationale: `docs/review-recommendations.md`

## Standard Validation

```bash
swift build
swift test
scripts/build-app.sh
plutil -lint Packaging/Info.plist
scripts/build-dmg.sh
scripts/validate-release-package.sh dist/PromptPaster-0.1.0.dmg
```
